cards.name: Rare Candy
cards.text: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokemon in play. If you have a Stage 1 or Stage 2 card that evolves from that Pokemon in your hand, put that card on the Basic Pokemon. (This counts as evolving that Pokemon.)

tests.name: evolves_basic_to_stage2
tests.description: Test that Rare Candy can evolve Basic directly to Stage 2

tests.name: evolves_basic_to_stage1
tests.description: Test that Rare Candy can evolve Basic to Stage 1
